Terraform will perform the following actions:

  # example_app.main will be updated in-place
  ~ resource "example_app" "main" {
      ~ settings = {
          ~ labels   = {
              ~ tier = "web" -> "api"
            }
          ~ replicas = 2 -> 3
        }
    }

Plan: 0 to add, 1 to change, 0 to destroy.
